message:
test(proptest): add QuarantineConfig serde roundtrip and from_config behavioral tests

3 new property tests:
- quarantine_config_json_roundtrip: serde JSON roundtrip for QuarantineConfig
- config_default_deserialization_always_valid: empty JSON produces valid defaults
- from_config_respects_max_audit_events: registry audit log bounded by config
39/39 proptest_policy_quarantine tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
